{{ define "title" }}Blog | {{ .Site.Title }}{{ end }} {{ define "main" }} {{ partial "header_table.html" (dict "ctx" . "Title" "Blog") }} {{ .Content }} {{ $posts := where (where .Pages "Draft" false) "Params.language" "en" }} {{ if $posts }}
    {{ range $posts }}
  • {{ .Title }} {{ .Date.Format .Site.Params.date_format }} {{ if .Description }}
    {{ .Description }}{{ else }}
    {{ .Summary | plainify | truncate 120 }}{{ end }}
    • {{ end }}
